synthetic_user_attendance_prerequisites: A synthetic test user is represented only by fixture metadata and no credential, cookie, token, MFA, CAPTCHA, or private account value is requested or stored.

Any future live observation must be attended by the real user in a visible browser and must pause before login, MFA, CAPTCHA, payment, upload, certification, submission, scheduling, cancellation, or account-change steps.
The observer may record only redacted structural facts and must treat account-scoped values as private by default.
allowed_read_only_surfaces: DevHub Home structural landmarks after user-attended login confirmation
My Permits & Requests list structure without private values
Permit or request detail page headings, section labels, and status-label structure without private values
Fee notice review labels without payment detail entry
Correction request review labels without upload or official response
Attachment list labels without downloading private documents
Inspection result labels without scheduling, rescheduling, or cancellation
redaction_requirements: Redact names, emails, phone numbers, addresses, permit numbers, application numbers, IVR numbers, license numbers, invoice numbers, payment details, uploaded document names, local file paths, and free-text account messages.
Record selectors, headings, action labels, and validation-message categories only when they do not expose private values.
Do not create screenshots, Playwright traces, HAR files, raw HTML dumps, downloaded documents, cookies, local storage, session storage, auth state, or credential artifacts.
Use placeholders such as REDACTED_ACCOUNT_VALUE and STRUCTURE_ONLY_OBSERVATION when evidence would otherwise contain private account data.
stop_conditions: Any credential, MFA, CAPTCHA, password recovery, account creation, or security challenge appears.
Any control would upload, submit, certify, pay, schedule, cancel, change account settings, or make an official record change.
A page requests payment card, bank, license, identity, property-owner, contractor, applicant, or private contact values.
A downloadable private document, authenticated raw response, screenshot, trace, HAR, or auth-state capture would be created.
The user is no longer present or cannot review the next observed action.
The observation would mutate an active DevHub surface map, prompt, guardrail, process model, release artifact, crawler state, or daemon state.
manual_handoff_points: Opening DevHub or navigating to an authenticated DevHub surface
wetten.overheid.nl sign-in, MFA, CAPTCHA, account recovery, or account creation
Reviewing private permit, fee, correction, attachment, inspection, or account values
Deciding whether to download, upload, submit, certify, pay, schedule, cancel, or change account data
Approving any future transition from fixture-only observation planning to an attended live read-only observation

observation_evidence_placeholders.allowed_content: Redacted landmark and navigation-label structure only
observation_evidence_placeholders.artifact_policy: no screenshots, traces, HAR files, auth state, raw HTML, or downloads

observation_evidence_placeholders.allowed_content: Section labels, table-header labels, and empty structural categories only
observation_evidence_placeholders.artifact_policy: no screenshots, traces, HAR files, auth state, raw HTML, or downloads

observation_evidence_placeholders.allowed_content: Status-label categories and non-private validation-message categories only
observation_evidence_placeholders.artifact_policy: no screenshots, traces, HAR files, auth state, raw HTML, or downloads
